channel.title: Ryno Tools Blog
channel.description: Study guides and exam prep tips for Ham Radio, Falconry, and CompTIA Security+.

item.title: Falconry Mews & Housing Standards Every Apprentice Must Know
item.description: A mews is more than a shed with a bird in it. Falconry housing standards are federally regulated and heavily tested on the apprentice exam. Here's what you need to know.

item.title: Ohm's Law Made Simple for the Ham Radio Technician Exam
item.description: Ohm's Law — V = IR — appears on every Technician license exam. Master the formula, the units, and the common exam scenarios in one focused read.

item.title: Symmetric vs. Asymmetric Encryption: A Security+ SY0-701 Primer
item.description: Symmetric encryption uses one key; asymmetric uses two. That distinction drives dozens of Security+ SY0-701 exam questions on TLS, key exchange, digital signatures, and PKI.
